subject: [VOTE] Release Apache Airflow 2.11.0 from 2.11.0-rc3
body:
To: dev@airflow.apache.org
Subject: [VOTE] Release Apache Airflow 2.11.0 from 2.11.0-rc3

Hi all,

I propose we release the following artifacts as Apache Airflow 2.11.0.

The release artifacts, signatures, and checksums are available at:
  https://dist.apache.org/repos/dist/dev/airflow/2.11.0-rc3/

The release tag to be voted upon:
  https://github.com/apache/airflow/releases/tag/2.11.0-rc3

The changelog for this release:
  https://github.com/apache/airflow/blob/2.11.0-rc3/CHANGELOG.md

Keys to verify artifact signatures:
  https://dist.apache.org/repos/dist/release/airflow/KEYS

Please vote to release:
  [ ] +1  Release Apache Airflow 2.11.0
  [ ] +0
  [ ] -1  Do not release (please comment with specific reasons)

This vote is open for at least 72 hours.

[SKIP-VERIFY: release-verify-rc was not run for this RC; the RM accepted this with the reason: rc3 is identical to rc2 except for a KEYS fix; RM confirmed all artefact checksums match rc2 which passed verify.]

Thanks,
Justin McLean
